steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: ”The reed of a wind instrument is the mouthpiece” is an independent clause. The blank introduces a relative clause that defines the mouthpiece and completes the sentence.

steps.title: Apply the statement word order and punctuation rule
steps.content: A relative clause uses statement word order (subject-verb, not question inversion), and a declarative statement ends with a period. Choice C correctly uses statement word order (“where sound is made”) and ends with a period. The other choices either invert the subject-verb in the relative clause or misuse a question mark. That matches choice C — C is correct.
